title: carex × langeana
intro: Carex × langeana, also known as Lange's sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the family Cyperaceae, resulting from the cross between Carex aquatilis and Carex marshallii. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Carex × langeana include its ability to aid in the treatment of urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder infections, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and alleviate joint pain. Carex × langeana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
